Independent Gold Trade Consultant · East Africa

Where African Gold Meets Global Capital

I help serious buyers safely enter the East African gold market — and help African sellers close real international deals. No brokering. No middlemen. Direct expertise on the ground.

Start a Conversation What I Do
4
Countries · KE · UG · TZ · DRC
For Buyers

You want to buy gold in Africa.
I make it safe and real.

Entering the African gold market without local knowledge is costly and risky. I structure the entire operation — from sourcing to delivery at your refinery.

  • Market entry strategy and business structure setup
  • Identification and vetting of reliable local sellers
  • Working with miners, artisanal traders and exporters
  • Liaison with government bodies and regulatory authorities
  • Quality control via accredited inspections and laboratories
  • Local smelting at certified refineries — knowing the players
  • Legal, insurance and banking partners on the ground
  • Full logistics from purchase point to destination airport
  • Transaction cost structuring and due diligence
For Sellers

You have gold to sell.
I connect you to the world.

International buyers have specific requirements on documentation, quality, pricing and procedures. I bridge the gap and help you meet those standards.

  • Preparation for international buyer requirements
  • Negotiations on price, quantity and delivery terms
  • Finding common ground — conditions, procedures, timelines
  • Export permit acquisition and regulatory compliance
  • Quality assay and XRF verification coordination
  • AML/KYC documentation and chain-of-custody records
  • Insurance structuring (CIF/FOB) for the shipment
  • Escrow and payment security arrangements
How It Works

From First Contact to Final Delivery

A structured, transparent process built on years of field experience across East Africa and the Gulf.

1
Consultation
We define your goals, budget, target volume and timeline. Buyers or sellers — the process starts here.
2
Due Diligence
KYC, AML checks, source verification. Compliance is non-negotiable from day one.
3
Sourcing & QC
On-site inspection, XRF purity testing, accredited assay. I personally verify what you are buying.
4
Documentation
Export permits, government clearances, insurance binders, chain-of-custody certificates.
5
Logistics
Secure transport, Brink's/Loomis escort, customs clearance, direct flight to destination.
6
Settlement
Delivery at destination refinery or bank. Payment confirmation. Deal closed cleanly.

Areas of Expertise

Deep Knowledge. Practical Experience.

Built through years of hands-on experience and established business partnerships across Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania and DRC.

01
Transaction Structuring & Deal Architecture
Collateral Management Agreements, escrow mechanisms, payment security, Collateral Transfer facilities. Structuring deals that protect all parties and close.
02
Regulatory Compliance & Government Relations
KRA C-18 export documentation, Ministry of Mines permits, ITSCI/RCM for DRC. Established working contacts with regulatory authorities across 4 countries.
03
Quality Control & Assay
XRF Niton field testing, accredited laboratory assays, fire assay verification, sealed sample protocols. I stand beside every test personally.
04
Fraud Prevention & Risk Management
Deep knowledge of common fraud schemes in the African gold market. Vetting sellers, verifying supply chains and protecting buyers from costly mistakes.
05
Local Market Knowledge
Trusted business partnerships with miners, traders, smelters, refineries, lawyers and insurers across Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania and DRC. Built over time, proven in practice.
06
Logistics & Chain of Custody
End-to-end secure logistics from mine to airport. Brink's/Loomis escort, customs clearance, insurance structuring, DMCC delivery in Dubai.
About

I was born in the USSR, but my real office is the sky between the savanna and the skyline. A handshake is still stronger than a contract — but the paperwork had better be perfect.

I work independently as a consultant and deal facilitator in the East African gold market. My clients are serious buyers looking to enter the African market safely, and African sellers who need a trusted partner to navigate international requirements.

Over years of working in the East African gold market, I have built trusted business contacts and established partnerships — with miners, government officials, lawyers, inspectors and refineries across Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania and DRC. This network of reliable relationships is what makes deals work.

I do not broker. I do not hold inventory. I structure transactions, protect my clients and make sure deals close the right way.

Igor Portonenko
Independent Consultant · Gold Trade · East Africa & Gulf
